item.text: {"concept":"throw","verdicts":[{"candidate":"A","verdict":"LOSSY","missing":"It omits rapid arm-and-wrist propulsion and instead requires the object to move and end far from the thrower.","quality":1,"reason":"The AST captures a bodily act causing an object to move, but its generic body-part instrument and false distance requirement do not distinguish a throw from related propelling acts."}]}
